## Summary

What changed, in plain language?

## Why

Why does this help `researchstack` users?

## Change Type

- [ ] source skill change
- [ ] generated distribution change
- [ ] install or packaging change
- [ ] memory behavior change
- [ ] docs only
- [ ] example or template update

## Validation

- [ ] ran `bun run gen:skill-docs --host codex`
- [ ] checked `README.md` still matches real behavior
- [ ] tested at least one install path
- [ ] verified any changed `agents/openai.yaml` prompts
- [ ] if memory changed, checked slug/update behavior

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out any behavior that is easy to miss, especially:

- host-specific behavior
- repo-local `.agents/skills` behavior
- generated output shape
- memory path or slug semantics
